features.name: In-Browser Python Scripting
features.description: Runs Python scripts directly in the browser via WebAssembly using the Pyodide engine, eliminating server round-trips and registering 'pyodide' as a first-class Datagrok script language.
features.evidence_summary: initPyodide bootstraps the WASM runtime and pyodideLanguageHandler is the registered scriptHandler routing all 'pyodide'-language scripts; the broad scripting docs describe the user experience built on top.

features.name: Script Vectorization
features.description: Automatically generates vectorized (columnar) code from element-wise Python scripts, enabling efficient batch processing of DataFrame columns without manual looping.
features.evidence_summary: makeVectorCode generates vectorized column code; the Calc Column scripts demonstrate and test that vectorization path, and the v1.0.0 changelog explicitly mentions 'scripts vectorization for scripts with language set to pyodide'.

features.name: Primitive Type Marshaling
features.description: Converts Python primitive values (bool, int, float, string, datetime, map, blob, column list) to and from JavaScript types, enabling seamless data exchange between Pyodide scripts and the Datagrok runtime.
features.evidence_summary: Scripts named after each primitive type (Bool, Int, Double, String, Date, Map, Blob, Column List) plus SimpleInputs and DatetimeTest pairs form a coherent type-marshaling test suite, corroborated by the 'Complex data types' scripting guide.

features.name: DataFrame Input/Output
features.description: Passes Datagrok DataFrames into and out of Pyodide scripts, allowing Python code to read, transform, and return tabular data without serialization overhead.
features.evidence_summary: EditDF*, DataFrameInputCall*, Empty Dataframe, and Single Df scripts all handle DataFrames as inputs or outputs; the v1.2.1 changelog fixes a bug in 'code generation for dataframes', confirming this as a distinct feature axis.

features.name: FuncCall Interop
features.description: Allows Pyodide scripts to invoke other Datagrok FuncCalls synchronously (via run_sync / execFuncCall), enabling Python-scripted orchestration of server-side or JS functions.
features.evidence_summary: All four *Call* scripts test invoking external FuncCalls from within pyodide scripts, directly matching the v1.3.0 changelog entry 'Allow calling FuncCalls via run_sync and execFuncCall'.

features.name: Script Package Dependencies
features.description: Supports declaring Python package dependencies for Pyodide scripts via the meta.dependencies annotation, automatically loading the required packages before script execution.
features.evidence_summary: The Deps Test script exercises the meta.dependencies mechanism introduced in v1.3.0 to auto-load Python packages inside the WASM sandbox.

features.name: Graphics Output
features.description: Renders visual output (charts, plots) produced by Pyodide scripts directly in the Datagrok UI, returning a graphics output column as the result.
features.evidence_summary: The Graphics script is explicitly described as 'graphics output column input' and maps directly to the 'Visualize output data' scripting guide.
